creator: niels@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi

Can you send me a new patch? This one does not apply (it's reversed)
(check this doc for patches:
http://ionut.tetcu.info/FreeBSD/How-to-submit-a-diff.txt )

PORTVERSION should be 0.20.1 instead of using PORTREVISION

Thanks,


-- 
Niels Heinen
FreeBSD committer | www.freebsd.org
PGP: 0x5FE39B80
